synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-2421 Important: Oracle Linux 8 nodejs:22 security update
description:
nodejs
[1:22.22.0-1]
- Update to 22.22.0
  Resolves: RHEL-118152

nodejs-nodemon
[3.0.1-1]
- Exclude ix86 arches from building.
  Related: RHEL-35991

nodejs-packaging
[2021.06-4]
- Exclude ix86 arches from building.
  Related: RHEL-35991
full_text:

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-2421.html
